spirit:component.spirit:description: The Versal Adaptive SoC GT Wizard Subsystem provides a method of configuring one or multiple serial transceivers for one or multiple protocol interfaces. Configurations can be customized on a per interface basis by manually customizing within the Versal Adaptive SoC GT Wizard Subsystem by importing parameter files, or sourcing directly from AMD IP. Usable in IPI or stand alone for use in RTL, the Versal Adaptive SoC GT Wizard Subsystem generates a customized core with RTL source files that incorporate resets and, optionally, the necessary clocks. Additionally, it can produce an example design for simple simulation and hardware usage demonstration.
